svg.title: A Knowledge Arc visualized as a curved field of inquiry
svg.desc: A central question anchors a curved arc. Books from different traditions sit along the arc as distinct glyphs. Threads connect books that speak to each other. Notebook entries cluster as small marks around the books they're anchored to.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how an arc question gets articulated in Praxis')
sendPrompt('Show me how a theory text lives in a Knowledge Arc alongside other registers')
sendPrompt('Show me how a memoir lives in a Knowledge Arc alongside theory and fiction')
sendPrompt('Show me how a novel speaks to theory and history inside a Knowledge Arc')
sendPrompt('Show me how a history text anchors a Knowledge Arc')
sendPrompt('How does a journal entry live inside a Knowledge Arc?')
sendPrompt('What does Yumi do inside a Knowledge Arc?')

svg.text: Tap any element to explore deeper
